Lab Results

AI-analyzed bloodwork and diagnostic results

Complete Blood Count + Comprehensive Metabolic Panel

VetDiagnostics Labs · Nov 20, 2025

borderline
🤖

AI Analysis

Luna's bloodwork shows mostly normal values with one area of attention. The ALT (liver enzyme) reading of 89 U/L is mildly elevated above the normal range of 10-55 U/L. This could be caused by dietary factors, recent exercise, or early liver stress. Given her otherwise healthy profile, I recommend a recheck in 3 months. The elevated ALT paired with her recent joint supplement addition warrants monitoring — some fish oil products can mildly affect liver enzymes. Overall, Luna is in good health with this minor watchpoint.

WBC (White Blood Cells)

Ref: 6–17 K/µL

8.2 K/µLnormal

RBC (Red Blood Cells)

Ref: 5.5–8.5 M/µL

6.8 M/µLnormal

Hemoglobin

Ref: 12–18 g/dL

15.2 g/dLnormal

Hematocrit

Ref: 37–55 %

47 %normal

Platelets

Ref: 200–500 K/µL

310 K/µLnormal

ALT (Liver Enzyme)

Ref: 10–55 U/L

89 U/Lhigh

AST

Ref: 15–52 U/L

38 U/Lnormal

BUN (Kidney)

Ref: 7–27 mg/dL

18 mg/dLnormal

Creatinine

Ref: 0.5–1.5 mg/dL

0.9 mg/dLnormal

Glucose

Ref: 70–138 mg/dL

94 mg/dLnormal

6.8 g/dLnormal

10.1 mg/dLnormal
